name: obsidian-rule-engine
description: Run commands and create custom HTML views for your notes based on filter rules. Transform how your vault behaves and how notes are displayed.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.release: npm run build && gh release create v%npm_package_version% --generate-notes --fail-on-no-commits main.js manifest.json styles.css --title "Release v%npm_package_version%" --notes "Update for version %npm_package_version%"

author: Jack Carey
